education.institution: University of Electronic Science and Technology of China

publications.name: Topology-Aware Vision Transformers for Enhanced Scene Recognition
publications.publisher: Proceedings of the AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence
publications.summary: This paper proposes Topology Attention Network for Scene Recognition (TANSR), which leverages graph-derived topological relationships to guide Vision Transformer-based scene recognition and improve performance on benchmark datasets including MIT-67, Scene-15, and SUN397.

publications.name: Fusion of Granular-Ball Visual Spatial Representations for Enhanced Facial Expression Recognition
publications.publisher: Proceedings of the Thirty-Fourth International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence
publications.summary: This paper proposes Component Separation and Granular-ball Space Bootstrap Fusion (CS-GBSBF), which transforms facial expression images into spatial graph representations using granular balls and fuses visual and spatial features for enhanced facial expression recognition.
